title: hypenia inelegans
intro: Hypenia inelegans is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and is also known as "Mexican mint" or "Spanish mint". The leaves of this plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and digestive problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Hypenia inelegans can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies to soothe sore throats and reduce stress.
